Description: SvelteKit structure is clearest when routing follows file conventions

Description: SvelteKit form actions keep mutation logic on the server

Description: Express route failures with Kit utilities

Guideline: Validate on the server as source of truth

Description: Follow Kit conventions to keep imports and types clean
